Table	Create Table
transactions	CREATE TABLE `transactions` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `evseId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `userId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `stationId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `tariffId` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `ocppTransactionId` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `ocppNumericTxId` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `startTime` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `endTime` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `kwhConsumed` decimal(10,4) DEFAULT '0',
  `meterStart` decimal(12,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `meterEnd` decimal(12,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `energyCost` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `timeCost` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `sessionCost` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `overstayCost` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `totalCost` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `investorShare` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `platformFee` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT '0',
  `transaction_status` enum('PENDING','IN_PROGRESS','COMPLETED','FAILED','CANCELLED') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
  `startMethod` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `stopReason` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `reservationId` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=390001
